g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the web crawler service')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the job platform scraper service')
sendPrompt('What tools should I use for the web crawler service?')
sendPrompt('What tools should I use for the platform scraper service?')
sendPrompt('How should I set up the message broker with Redis Streams?')
sendPrompt('How does the contact discovery service find emails?')
sendPrompt('How does the job aggregation and sorting service work?')
sendPrompt('How does the cold email generator work?')
sendPrompt('What database schema should I use for job listings?')
sendPrompt('How should I use Redis for caching job data?')
sendPrompt('What should the frontend UI look like for this system?')
